findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "acc_list_projects" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Enumerate every ACC and BIM 360 project the authenticated APS app can see by walking all accessible hubs and their project lists. When to use: The agent needs t…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "acc_list_issues" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.
